raw_consumer_statement: I booked a room with XXXX through XXXX for XXXX. The email and receipt ( both are attached ) clearly state that there are no mandatory fees. The only mandatory charge when I arrive should be the deposit. When I arrived they illegally forced me to pay a housekeeping fee for the stay at check in. This is illegal drip pricing because this mandatory fee was not disclosed. I complained to XXXX who said they contacted XXXX and they refused to refund. I then filed a credit card complaint with Barclaycard. Barclaycard closed my complaint without ever contacting me or asking for any documentation.
